response.justification: Bogdan is a broadly experienced, hands-on engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, and his recent AI-agent tooling work matches the AI-first framing of the role. However, the position is a Principal-level (IC6) role centered on growth and experimentation systems, and the resume shows no experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, metrics/guardrail design, or statistical analysis — the core of the job. His scope has been senior/staff IC work on product teams rather than leading multi-workstream, cross-team platform initiatives at the level this role requires.
strengths: Strong engineering fundamentals with broad language and stack breadth (TypeScript/Node, DLang, C/C++, Java, C#)
Production experience at scale, including low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Demonstrated use of AI tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) plus open-source leadership and developer-tooling contributions
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core domain of the role
No demonstrated statistical analysis or metrics/telemetry platform background beyond general backend work
Career scope is senior/staff IC; no evidence of Principal-level, multi-team architectural leadership or cross-org initiative ownership

key_factors.factor: Solid engineering breadth and high-scale systems experience
